method_note: Validation checks structural data quality and linkage integrity. It does not add analytical claims or change the event-study methodology.

theory_coverage.method_note: Theory-variable coverage summarizes optional interpretive coding. Blank values indicate insufficient support for conservative coding.
use_limits: Coverage statistics do not change event-study results.
Variables are descriptive operationalizations, not causal estimates.

warnings.note: These news items do not link to an event_id in data/events_v2.csv and require analyst review before use in event-linked analysis.

records.title: Nauru switches diplomatic recognition from Taiwan to China
